canonical_definition: Annual Conference on Machine Translation shared task dataset for evaluating machine translation systems, containing human-rated translations across multiple language pairs and systems.
papers: From Jack of All Trades to Master of One: Specializing LLM-based Autoraters to a Test Set
Overestimation in LLM Evaluation: A Controlled Large-Scale Study on Data Contamination’s Impact on Machine Translation

definitions.text: A machine translation evaluation dataset from the Workshop on Machine Translation 2024, used in this study as a non-contaminated test set to measure generalization.
definitions.paper: Overestimation in LLM Evaluation: A Controlled Large-Scale Study on Data Contamination’s Impact on Machine Translation
